scripts.dev: node scripts/apply-analysis-upgrade.mjs && node scripts/apply-calibration-signal-fix.mjs && vinext dev --port 4173
scripts.build: node scripts/apply-analysis-upgrade.mjs && node scripts/apply-calibration-signal-fix.mjs && vinext build
scripts.build:github: node scripts/generate-pwa-icon.mjs && node scripts/generate-ios-icon.mjs && node scripts/apply-analysis-upgrade.mjs && node scripts/apply-calibration-signal-fix.mjs && vite build --config vite.github.config.ts
scripts.check:github: npm run build:github && node tests/github-pages.test.mjs && node tests/question-bank.test.mjs && node tests/history-engine.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && node tests/rendered-html.test.mjs && node tests/question-bank.test.mjs && node tests/history-engine.test.mjs
scripts.lint: node scripts/apply-analysis-upgrade.mjs && node scripts/apply-calibration-signal-fix.mjs && eslint . --ignore-pattern dist --ignore-pattern .next --ignore-pattern work --ignore-pattern github-dist
